gui_features.name: Conversation Threads Panel
gui_features.description: Left panel displaying list of saved conversations with thread names

subfeatures.name: Thread Display
subfeatures.description: Shows thread name, creation/modified date, context menu

subfeatures.name: Thread Operations
subfeatures.description: Create, rename, delete, and switch between threads

subfeatures.name: Search
subfeatures.description: Real-time thread filtering by name

subfeatures.name: Date Grouping
subfeatures.description: Groups threads by calendar day when sorted by Date created or Date modified

subfeatures.name: Sorting
subfeatures.description: Sort threads by Date created, Date modified, or Name

gui_features.name: Main Conversation Panel
gui_features.description: Right panel displaying active conversation with message history

subfeatures.name: Message Bubbles
subfeatures.description: Chat-style message display with user and agent alignment

subfeatures.name: Markdown Rendering
subfeatures.description: Agent responses rendered as formatted markdown

subfeatures.name: Tool Execution Blocks
subfeatures.description: Collapsible sections for tool execution output

subfeatures.name: Timestamps
subfeatures.description: Optional message timestamps on hover or compact display

subfeatures.name: Input Area
subfeatures.description: Multi-line text input for user messages with send functionality

subfeatures.name: Agent Status
subfeatures.description: Visual indicator showing agent state (Idle, Thinking, Running tool)

gui_features.name: Data Management
gui_features.description: Backend data structures and storage for GUI functionality

subfeatures.name: Thread Storage
subfeatures.description: JSON files stored in .bookworm/threads/ directory

subfeatures.name: Thread Schema
subfeatures.description: Structured JSON schema with id, name, timestamps, and messages

subfeatures.name: Draft Persistence
subfeatures.description: In-memory draft text storage for uns messages

subfeatures.name: Context Menus
subfeatures.description: Right-click menus for thread operations

subfeatures.name: Inline Editing
subfeatures.description: Double-click thread names for immediate renaming

subfeatures.name: Visual Feedback
subfeatures.description: Active thread highlighting and visual indicators

subfeatures.name: Confirmation Dialogs
subfeatures.description: User confirmation for destructive actions like deletion

subfeatures.name: Backend Communication
subfeatures.description: Real-time communication with Bookworm agent

subfeatures.name: Thread Synchronization
subfeatures.description: Sync thread state with agent backend

subfeatures.name: Message Persistence
subfeatures.description: Persistent storage of conversation history
